title: Citation of Part
doc_html:
PART II.  ANHYDROUS AMMONIA

§1911.  Citation of Part

This Part shall be known as the "Anhydrous Ammonia Law of Louisiana".

Acts 1990, No. 247, §1; Redesignated by Acts 2010, No. 579, §4 from R.S. 3:1351.
doc_text:
PART II.  ANHYDROUS AMMONIA
§1911.  Citation of Part
This Part shall be known as the "Anhydrous Ammonia Law of Louisiana".
Acts 1990, No. 247, §1; Redesignated by Acts 2010, No. 579, §4 from R.S. 3:1351.
